headline: Jobs Report, Palantir, Pinterest, AMD, PayPal, Disney, and More to Watch This Week
summary: ON Semiconductor, Pfizer, Uber, McDonald’s, and many more will report earnings this week. Economic releases will include the April jobs report and purchasing managers index.

headline: PayPal Stock Is Down 15% in 2026. Bulls Are Now Betting on a Reorganization to Turn Things Around
summary: PayPal announced it is reorganizing into three business units and making several leadership changes.

headline: PayPal's Epic Fall In Numbers
summary: PayPal has transitioned from a high-growth Wall Street darling to a value stock with stagnant user and revenue growth. Read the latest analysis on PYPL stock here.
